title: HIAL Security Training Team Receives 'Outstanding' Award

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The security training team at Highlands and Islands Airports Limited (HIAL) has been recognised for their excellence in performance with an 'Outstanding' rating in their assessment conducted under the UK Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) Quality Assurance Framework. This accolade highlights the team's commitment to maintaining high standards of safety and security in aviation.

The HIAL airports are crucial hubs connecting communities across the Highlands and Islands, supporting the region's connectivity and development, where aviation has played a vital role since the inter-war period.

sourceReferences.citationText: hial-airports – “Outstanding” Award for HIAL Security Training Team
